growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.

mfa.note: Figure 1B; lowest biomass yield, low relative PP-pathway flux, massive pyruvate overflow (distinct from acetate overflow).

growth_records.cite: Tannler, Simon et al. Maintenance metabolism and carbon fluxes in Bacillus species. Microbial Cell Factories (2008). DOI:10.1186/1475-2859-7-19. [PMC2442585]
growth_records.snippet: B. amyloliquefaciens: growth rate 0.32; yield 0.23 gCDW/gglc; glucose 6.05; pyruvate 5.45 mmol/g/h (acetate n/a) (Table 2). Maintenance 0.35 +/-0.13 mmol/g/h (Table 3).
growth_records.notes: Distinct overflow: secretes pyruvate not acetate. mu=0.32; td=0.693/0.32=2.17 h. qGlc 6.05, qPyruvate 5.45 experimental. Maintenance 0.35 (R2=0.993). Grown in 250 mL stirred bioreactor due to sedimentation. CDW/OD 0.36.

phenotypes.base_medium: Enzyme / activity assay (hydrolysis, degradation, reduction, electron transfer) in a test medium — not a sole-substrate growth test
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 598 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/598
